overall_novelty.prior_art: Ashworth 2015 PMID 25881025 — percolation in collagen scaffolds for tissue engineering (fibroblasts, NOT tumor immunology)

hypotheses.title: Voronoi Tessellation of Tumor ECM with LOX Crosslink Density as Bond Occupation Probability
hypotheses.reason: Genuinely novel connection with high mechanistic specificity, verified citations, falsifiable predictions, actionable test protocol with drugs in clinical trials. d_w value uncertainty flagged but framework robust.

grounding_issues.detail: Wikipedia lists d_w = 2.28-2.31. Value may need correction. Changes MSD prediction (alpha = 0.695 vs 0.88) but not framework.

impact_annotation.nearest_applied_domain: Immuno-oncology / LOX inhibitor clinical trial design

hypotheses.title: Two-Exponent Test for Active-Percolation Universality Class in Tumor ECM
hypotheses.reason: Well-conceived measurement framework converting universality class assumption into direct measurement. Two-exponent test is falsifiable and over-constrained. All major values verified.

grounding_issues.detail: Specific paper not confirmed. Value is correct (2.313 from multiple other sources). Not a hallucination — imprecise attribution of correct value.

hypotheses.title: Collagen I/III Ratio Tunes Percolation Threshold p_c via Effective Coordination Number z
hypotheses.reason: Corrects fundamental conceptual error from parent. Prediction that Col I/III ratio independently predicts immune exclusion after controlling for total crosslink density is specific, falsifiable, testable.

hypotheses.title: TGF-beta Correlated Percolation with p_c Shift Predicts LOX Inhibitor / Anti-TGF-beta Synergy
hypotheses.reason: Mechanistically sound with verified citations and clinically relevant prediction. Downgraded due to directional notation inconsistency, small predicted p_c shift (0.01-0.05), and pleiotropic TGF-beta confounders.

grounding_issues.detail: Bond-occupation vs pore-occupation perspectives create confusing notation. Physics consistent upon careful reading but presentation unclear.
Activation mechanism grounded. Exact diffusion range of active TGF-beta parametric.

hypotheses.title: MT1-MMP Circadian Dynamic Percolation Window for Chronotherapy
hypotheses.reason: FABRICATED PROTEIN PROPERTY. MT1-MMP surface half-life is ~15-30 min (rapid clathrin-mediated endocytosis), NOT 18-24 hr. Cited papers (Lafleur 2006, Remacle 2003) describe rapid internalization, not 18-24 hr half-life. Dynamic percolation framework depends on fabricated timescale. Chronotherapy of anti-PD-1 already published (Qian 2024 Cell) via T cell circadian biology.

grounding_issues.detail: MT1-MMP rapidly internalized in 5-30 min. Lafleur 2006 and Remacle 2003 describe rapid endocytosis mechanism, not 18-24 hr half-life. Timescale reverse-engineered from desired circadian period.
Some circadian regulation of MMP-14 exists in fibroblasts/cartilage but direct BMAL1/CLOCK phase-locking not established.

grounding_issues.claim: Lafleur 2006 and Remacle 2003 as supporting 18-24 hr half-life
grounding_issues.detail: Papers exist and are real but describe rapid internalization mechanism, not the claimed half-life.

hypotheses.novelty_detail: Circadian timing of anti-PD-1 immunotherapy published (Qian et al. 2024 Cell) via T cell circadian biology. ECM percolation angle novel but invalidated by fabricated timescale.

fail_reasons.E5-H6: FABRICATED PROTEIN PROPERTY: MT1-MMP surface half-life ~15-30 min, not 18-24 hr
